drills.title: Buildings, Worms & Insects Vocabulary — Speaking Set 1

sentences.english: This is a big building.
sentences.pronunciation: this is a big building

sentences.english: The hospital is in the middle of the city.
sentences.hindi: अस्पताल शहर के बीच में है।
sentences.pronunciation: the hospital is in the middle of the city

sentences.english: The temple is very old.
sentences.pronunciation: the temple is very old

drills.title: Buildings, Worms & Insects Vocabulary — Speaking Set 2

sentences.english: The bridge is built over the river.
sentences.hindi: पुल नदी के ऊपर बना है।
sentences.pronunciation: the bridge is built over the river

sentences.english: There is a lot of noise in the factory.
sentences.pronunciation: there is a lot of noise in the factory

sentences.english: There are many shops in the mall.
sentences.hindi: मॉल में बहुत सारी दुकानें हैं।
sentences.pronunciation: there are many shops in the mall

drills.title: Buildings, Worms & Insects Vocabulary — Speaking Set 3

sentences.english: The tower is very tall.
sentences.pronunciation: the tower is very tall

sentences.english: The school building is new.
sentences.pronunciation: the school building is new

sentences.english: Ants are walking on the ground.
sentences.hindi: चींटियाँ जमीन पर चल रही हैं।
sentences.pronunciation: ants are walking on the ground

drills.title: Buildings, Worms & Insects Vocabulary — Speaking Set 4

sentences.english: Mosquitoes bite at night.
sentences.pronunciation: mosquitoes bite at night

sentences.english: The cockroach is hiding in the kitchen.
sentences.pronunciation: the cockroach is hiding in the kitchen

sentences.english: The spider wove a web.
sentences.pronunciation: the spider wove a web

drills.title: Buildings, Worms & Insects Vocabulary — Speaking Set 5

sentences.english: The butterfly is sitting on the flower.
sentences.pronunciation: the butterfly is sitting on the flower

sentences.english: Bees make honey.
sentences.pronunciation: bees make honey

sentences.english: The fly sat on the food.
sentences.pronunciation: the fly sat on the food

drills.title: Buildings, Worms & Insects Vocabulary — Speaking Set 6

sentences.english: Termites eat wood.
sentences.pronunciation: termites eat wood

sentences.english: The earthworm makes the soil fertile.
sentences.hindi: केंचुआ मिट्टी को उपजाऊ बनाता है।
sentences.pronunciation: the earthworm makes the soil fertile

sentences.english: The caterpillar eats leaves.
sentences.pronunciation: the caterpillar eats leaves

drills.title: Buildings, Worms & Insects Vocabulary — Speaking Set 7

sentences.english: This building is a government office.
sentences.pronunciation: this building is a government office

sentences.english: Insects come out after the rain.
sentences.hindi: कीड़े बारिश के बाद निकलते हैं।
sentences.pronunciation: insects come out after the rain
